title: Desire Deluxe Tie Dye Kit – Set of 18 Colours Ink Tie-Dye Kits for Dyeing Fabric, Clothes – Creative Art Craft Games Activity for Kids & Adults (180pc)
features: Vibrant Colours - Create the latest cool fashions to your clothes and accessories by adding vibrant colours with tie dye kit by Desire Deluxe.

Great Party Game – Desire Deluxe tie dye kit will turn your party into the most colourful destination on the block! Perfect for classrooms, summer camps, family reunions, team/group events, Christmas & Birthday present and more.
Unique Premium Dye – The Desire Deluxe dyes are permanent and colour-fast, so they won't fade in the wash, and since the dyes are mixable, you can create your own custom colours.
Easy to Use – One-step process – just add water. Includes step-by-step technique guide featuring over 18 tie-dye colours to choose from.
Complete Kit - Package Include: 18 x Bottles, 18 x Dye Powder, 120 x Rubber bunds, 20 x Gloves, 1 x Reusable Surface Cover, 2 x Funnel, 1 x Manual
description: Product Description Take the fantastic fashion from festivals and sport this look your own way, everyday! Desire Deluxe Tie Dye Kit allows you to create on trend, vibrant fashion pieces of your own. This trendy kit includes everything you need to get started on your own designs including gloves, rubber bands and incredible colours. All you need to do is add the water and get dyeing! Design and dye any piece of clothing or accessories with these dyes and the many different techniques included in the pack. You don’t have to be profesional to create your own vogue! Children are not perfectionists, so you don't have to worry about making life-like designs! You can easily look video on YouTube and in no time come a professional. It is easy, fun and enjoyable time for creavity. PERFECT GIFT SET FANCY PARTY HOURS OF FUN Create the latest cool fashions. Transform clothes and accessories with vibrant tie dye styles. If you're looking for some fun ways to pass the time , a DIY tie dye kit could be the answer to solve boredom qualms and to indulge in some creative fun. Process is pretty fun and it's a nice way to get creative - especially with kids at home. Follow the techniques in the colour-illustrated activity guide and learn how to create a trendy new look for t-shirts and accessories. Easy one-step process - just add water Dyes are safe to machine wash – colors stay bright and bold through repeated washings Best and brightest on natural fiber fabrics Perfect Gift Set! Package Include : 18pc Squeeze Bottles, 18pc Dye Contain bags, 120pc Rubber Bands , 20pc Gloves , 2pc Funnel , 1pc Reusable Surface Cover , 1pc Manual , 1pc Storage Box Ink Colours: Orange, Red, Purplish Red, Rose Red, Pink, Magenta, Light Yellow, Yellow, Sky Blue, Purple, Misty Rose, Dark Purple, Gras Green, Light Green, Black, Coat Blue, Aqua, Gold Desire Deluxe Tie Dye Kit is so easy to use it.Just add water to full and begin your creation. Easy to Dye a) Lay flat the I-shirt or the cloth you wish to color on the workspace. b) Visually identify the center of the thing and fix it with your thumb and forefinger and start moving it circularly. You will see that the cloth is slowly gathering around the center in a spiral manner. Create Your Own Vogue c) You are creator, so choose how many bands to use. Our suggestion is at least 4 bands to create 8 sections. d) Once you have tied all the rubber bands, mix the dyes, and prepare to color the shirt/cloth. Please make sure that your will color both side. Attractive Fashion Look e) You can now start adding the color to the shirt/cloth. Once you have finished adding the color, put the cloth in a plastic bag (poly bag) and leave it for 5-8 hours. To avoid the different colors mix together,please wash it after the dyes are completely dry.
